name: positioninghq
description: A complete GTM and positioning intelligence suite for founders, PMMs, and sales leaders. Includes 6 skills: vault setup, company research, positioning playbooks, competitive battlecards, sales call prep, and product launch planning.
author: PositioningHQ

skills.name: setup-positioning-vault
skills.description: Initialises a PositioningHQ vault for a company. Creates the required folder structure, collects company details, and runs company-research and positioning-playbook to populate memory with foundational context. Run this first.

skills.name: company-research
skills.description: Perform comprehensive company research and produce a structured positioning document covering market, product, customers, strengths, weaknesses, and competitive landscape.

skills.name: positioning-playbook
skills.description: Generate a complete, sales-ready Positioning Playbook covering ICP, value drivers, distinct advantages, positioning statement, competitive intelligence, and customer proof points.

skills.name: competitive-battlecards
skills.description: Generate one markdown battlecard per competitor, designed for sales new hire enablement. Enriches internal materials with web search to cover positioning, objections, landmine questions, and proof points.

skills.name: call-plan
skills.description: Generate a fully personalized sales call plan as a Word doc (.docx), tailored to the prospect, call stage (discovery / demo / follow-up / closing), and your product's positioning.

skills.name: product-launch
skills.description: Generate a complete product launch plan through a structured founder interview: messaging narrative, GTM channel plan, sales enablement brief, internal FAQ, launch announcement, success metrics, and a positioning impact assessment.
